== Notes for [[Item:Q88231|Q88231]] ==

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Antiochus_I_Soter

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Antiochus_(father_of_Seleucus_I_Nicator)

------------------------------------------------------------

ID: I62214

Name: Antiochus of Syria

Given Name: Antiochus

Surname: of Syria

Sex: M

_UID: AF9745672D29084AA619FBE8CDC279418589

Change Date: 26 Nov 2005

Death: Y

Father: Seleucus of Syria

Marriage 1 Laodice

Married:

Children

Seleucus I of Syria b: ABT 358 BC

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I62214
--------------------
Nicknames: "??t????? ? ?a?ed??"

Birthdate: cirka -390

Death: (Date and location unknown)

Nærmeste familie

Laodice

wife

Seleucus I Nicator, King of the ...

son

Didymeia

daughter

Seleucus

father

Ptolemy, somatophylax

brother

RESEARCH NOTES:
Also father of Berenice of Macedonia

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per00576.htm#0

Birth: in c. 378 BC

Birth: in c. 378 BC

Birth: in c. 378 BC

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
